sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Updates a warranty claim record with agent_decision, agent_recommendation, and api_call_timestamp using GlideRecord. IMPORTANT: agent_decision must be exact lowercase: approve, deny, or escalate. Returns the updated field values to confirm persistence.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"number","description":"Claim number in WC-format (e.g. WC0001022) OR the sys_id of the claim. Use whichever was returned by the Create or Lookup tool.","mandatory":true},{"name":"agent_decision","description":"Decision value - MUST be exact lowercase: approve, deny, or escalate","mandatory":true},{"name":"agent_recommendation","description":"Complete multi-paragraph reasoning with KB citations embedded (max 4000 chars)","mandatory":true},{"name":"api_call_timestamp","description":"Current timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format)","mandatory":false}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Update Warranty Claim
